title: Farmers' institute conductor
doc_html:
§302.  Farmers' institute conductor

The commissioner of agriculture and forestry may appoint a farmers' institute conductor, who shall devote his time exclusively to the work, as the commissioner may direct.

Acts 2009, No. 24, §1, eff. June 12, 2009.
doc_text:
§302.  Farmers' institute conductor
The commissioner of agriculture and forestry may appoint a farmers' institute conductor, who shall devote his time exclusively to the work, as the commissioner may direct.
Acts 2009, No. 24, §1, eff. June 12, 2009.
